drivers.notes: Decoupled Carbon Dome in Solid Body Tweeter-on-Top

description.en: Three-way floorstander combining a Solid Body Tweeter-on-Top with a Continuum-cone FST midrange and dual Aerofoil bass drivers. Rear-ported cabinet with Biomimetic Suspension delivers transparent imaging and authoritative low end in medium-to-large rooms.
description.es: Floorstander de tres vías que combina el Solid Body Tweeter-on-Top con un midrange Continuum FST y dos woofers Aerofoil. El gabinete con puerto trasero y suspensión Biomimetic ofrece imagen transparente y graves contundentes en salas medianas a grandes.
